description: Plugin-distributed hooks for behavioral-health-practice. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable behavioral-health anti-patterns (a plaintext-PHI pattern such as an SSN or DOB in an artifact; a disclosure/record-sharing doc with no ROI/consent reference; a Part 2 / substance-use record disclosed with no consent reference; a 'self-service' doc that still routes to a ticket). Set BH_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
